channel.title: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: Borrowed boots, borrowed joy: Football thrives in Gaza camps
item.description: Matches organised by a former professional player are providing a brief respite from the harsh reality of life for the thousands living in overcrowded tents, schools or damaged buildings in the shattered Occupied Palestinian Territory of Gaza.

item.title: [UN: May 29] Israel & Russia Blacklisted for Sexual Violence in War; Myanmar Envoy MIA & Lots More
item.description: This Week @UN: Myanmar envoy MIA; US bans Iran, Russia VIPs from UN forum; Equatorial Guinea’s endungeoned activist. Plus: Russia revs up in Kyiv; Israel and Russia blacklisted for rapes and other sexual violence in war; US envoy, party animal; intensifying air/ground violence in South Lebanon. Did someone forward this email to you? Subscribe here! Follow ... Read more
